query:
-- Get distinct supplier accounts on unmatched services and their best customer match
-- Exclude the huge Smile IT account (586992900) for now - handle separately
SELECT 
  u.supplierAccount,
  u.supplierName,
  COUNT(DISTINCT u.externalId) AS unmatched_count,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT m.customerExternalId ORDER BY m.customerExternalId SEPARATOR ',') AS candidate_customers,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT m.customerName ORDER BY m.customerName SEPARATOR ' | ') AS candidate_names
FROM services u
JOIN services m ON m.supplierAccount = u.supplierAccount
  AND m.supplierName = u.supplierName
  AND (m.customerExternalId IS NOT NULL AND m.customerExternalId != '')
WHERE (u.customerExternalId IS NULL OR u.customerExternalId = '')
  AND u.supplierAccount IS NOT NULL AND u.supplierAccount != ''
  AND u.supplierAccount != '586992900'
GROUP BY u.supplierAccount, u.supplierName
ORDER BY unmatched_count DESC;

-- Exclude the huge Smile IT account (586992900) for now - handle separately
SELECT 
  u.supplierAccount,
  u.supplierName,
  COUNT(DISTINCT u.externalId) AS unmatched_count,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT m.customerExternalId ORDER BY m.customerExternalId SEPARATOR ',') AS candidate_customers,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT m.customerName ORDER BY m.customerName SEPARATOR ' | ') AS candidate_names
FROM services u
JOIN services m ON m.supplierAccount = u.supplierAccount
  AND m.supplierName = u.supplierName
  AND (m.customerExternalId IS NOT NULL AND m.customerExternalId != '')
WHERE (u.customerExternalId IS NULL OR u.customerExternalId = '')
  AND u.supplierAccount IS NOT NULL AND u.supplierAccount != ''
  AND u.supplierAccount != '586992900'
GROUP BY u.supplierAccount, u.supplierName
ORDER BY unmatched_count DESC;
